evidence_snippets: last 30 days should complete in about 30 minutes
coverage_entries.reason: 30-minute target for 30-day rebuild specified.

evidence_snippets: support at least six concurrent users
coverage_entries.reason: Six concurrent users explicitly required.

evidence_snippets: run on existing in-store Windows PCs
coverage_entries.reason: Must run on current store Windows PCs; no new hardware.

evidence_snippets: in-app scheduled backups and on-demand restore
coverage_entries.reason: Scheduled automated backups and in-app restore requested.

evidence_snippets: apply consistently across IQA, PFE, PME
coverage_entries.reason: Central accounts with password/permission propagation required.

evidence_snippets: Role-based access per subsystem
coverage_entries.reason: Granular, per-subsystem role-based access specified.

evidence_snippets: outputs must be acceptable to external auditors
coverage_entries.reason: Audit-readiness and traceability to satisfy external auditors.

evidence_snippets: avoid any components that charge per user
coverage_entries.reason: Stakeholders forbid per-user or royalty-fee components.

evidence_snippets: manual "Run IQA for Day" action
coverage_entries.reason: On-demand day-specific IQA run explicitly requested.

evidence_snippets: Rebuild From Date regenerates all adjustments
coverage_entries.reason: Rebuild-from-date option requested to regenerate range.

evidence_snippets: consult on-hand stock; apply substitution lists
coverage_entries.reason: Source requires using on-hand stock for substitutions.

evidence_snippets: Maintain formulas
coverage_entries.reason: PFE described for maintaining product formulas.

evidence_snippets: semi-products that are used inside other formulas
coverage_entries.reason: Semi-products with own formulas referenced by finals.

evidence_snippets: Each ingredient can have an allowed substitution list.
coverage_entries.reason: Ingredients support defining allowed substitution lists.

evidence_snippets: propose common alternates automatically
coverage_entries.reason: PFE will auto-suggest common alternates to pre-fill lists.

evidence_snippets: order is meaningful and must persist across sessions
coverage_entries.reason: Substitution order is stated as persistent and meaningful.

evidence_snippets: pull directly from the accounting product catalog
coverage_entries.reason: PME is required to build and manage POS menus.

evidence_snippets: pull directly from the accounting product catalog
coverage_entries.reason: PME must source products from accounting catalog.

evidence_snippets: support nested menus and submenus
preserve the order you set
coverage_entries.reason: Nested menus with explicit, persistent ordering required.

evidence_snippets: single product may be placed in more than one submenu
coverage_entries.reason: Source explicitly allows products in multiple submenus.

evidence_snippets: classic Windows—menus, toolbars
Must run on existing in-store Windows PCs
coverage_entries.reason: Classic Windows UI requested, but Windows XP not specified.

evidence_snippets: IQA docs generated automatically upon import
tie-back to relevant product/formula
coverage_entries.reason: IQA generation tied to sales and product/formula traceability.

evidence_snippets: auto-generate IQAs when the POS sales file arrives
coverage_entries.reason: Source explicitly requires automatic IQA on sales import.

unsupported_implied.text: The application shall provide in-app scheduled automated backups and an in-app restore workflow (i.e., backup scheduling and restore must be managed from the application UI rather than relying on external/command-line tools).
unsupported_implied.source_snippet: Provide scheduled automated backups of RMS business data (nightly acceptable); also allow an in-app on-demand restore when needed (e.g., menu changes made in error).
unsupported_implied.reason: The gold set requires automatic backups and on-demand restore but does not specify that backup scheduling and restore must be performed inside the application (as opposed to external scripts or command-line tools). The source explicitly requires in-app scheduling/restore, and also elsewhere rejects reliance on command-line tools — a stronger deployment/UX constraint not covered by the gold requirements.

unsupported_implied.text: The system shall keep a basic log/trail of backup and restore actions to support audit checks.
unsupported_implied.source_snippet: Keep a basic log/trail of backup and restore actions to support audit checks.
unsupported_implied.reason: The source explicitly requires basic logging of backup/restore operations to support audits. The gold requirements mandate backup and restore functionality and audit-readiness of data, but do not require retention of a backup/restore action log — a tangible audit-support feature missing from the gold list.
